output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's Your 60-Second Fix
output.meta_description: Landlord withholding your deposit? Send a legal demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99. No signup needed. Get your money back at Deposits-Back.com.
content_outline: The Silent Treatment: When Landlords Ignore Legal Deadlines
What Your Landlord Can (and Cannot) Deduct From Your Deposit
From Frustration to Action: Why a Demand Letter Works
State-by-State Timelines Tenants Need to Know
How to Send a Professional Demand Letter in Under a Minute
key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14-30 days
Normal wear and tear, scuffed floors, and faded paint are not valid deductions
A formal demand letter citing state law often forces payment without going to court
Deposits-Back.com generates state-specific letters for $19.99 with no signup or subscription
output.cta: Don't let your landlord keep what's yours. Visit Deposits-Back.com, answer a few quick questions, and send a professional security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds. Just $19.99. No signup. No subscription. Get your deposit back today.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlords are withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting from their security deposit and need fast, affordable legal help.

They might owe you double. Stop texting. Stop calling. Send a formal demand letter that actually works. Deposits-Back dot com. 60 seconds. 19 bucks. No signup. Link in bio.
